files.notes: Clean-rebuilt as the single local Windows Docker Desktop guide. The public tunnel path now uses the Compose ngrok service, optional AI-coding-agent MCP feature references are secondary, and the supported launcher is _n8n-local.cmd.
Clean-rebuilt into a Hostinger-only VPS page, with current Hostinger n8n plan/template/update/domain references verified on 2026-05-31.
Clean-rebuilt into a two-page source index: Local Setup and Hostinger VPS, with skills-first routing and optional secondary AI-coding-agent MCP feature references.
Clean-rebuilt as an optional Claude Code AI-coding-agent MCP feature reference, secondary to the beginner local setup flow.
Clean-rebuilt as an optional OpenCode AI-coding-agent MCP feature reference, secondary to the beginner local setup flow.
Clean-rebuilt as an optional Antigravity AI-coding-agent MCP feature reference, secondary to the beginner local setup flow.
User-supplied final Codex AI-coding-agent MCP feature reference restored as secondary to the beginner local setup flow.
Restored as an optional Antigravity AI-coding-agent MCP config template.
Restored as an optional Claude Code AI-coding-agent MCP config template.
Restored as an optional Codex AI-coding-agent MCP config template.
Restored as an optional OpenCode AI-coding-agent MCP config template.
Local Compose stack remains source-owned here. It is local-first with Postgres and n8n; the ngrok service is the supported Compose tunnel path.
Placeholder-only environment template updated to separate local runtime values from optional public URL values.
Renamed by adding an underscore prefix. _n8n-local.cmd is now the supported launcher entrypoint.
Desktop convenience launcher added. It delegates to %USERPROFILE%\.n8n-local\_n8n-local.cmd so runtime files stay out of OneDrive Desktop.
Clean-rebuilt menu with exact guide option names. The menu loops after actions and closes only when the user selects Exit or closes the window.
Wrapper path and console formatting adapted after migration to use an underscore-prefixed entrypoint and clearer colored status output.
Toolkit-adapted after migration to delegate to the current inert .template.md agent-rule generator instead of regenerating retired active-name template docs.
Collapsed into the Local Setup and Hostinger VPS update sections during the clean rebuild. The standalone upgrade page is no longer published.
Collapsed into Local Setup. The supported public tunnel path now uses the Compose ngrok service.
Collapsed into Local Setup and local stack templates. The standalone Compose/ngrok reference is no longer published.
Obsolete BAT launcher removed. The supported launcher is _n8n-local.cmd.
The full n8n ruleset no longer belongs to n8n.local-setup. It moved to _projects/development/ai-coding-agent-rules/_main/_partials/n8n-agent-rules.md and publishes through skills/n8n-agent-rules/.
